TYPES.FPCLINE: types : tt_VBDPA type STANDARD TABLE OF VBDPA.
* VBELN TYPE VBAP-VBELN," MODIFIED BY PJ
TYPES : TT_VBUP TYPE TABLE OF ty_VBUP.
TYPES : TT_VBDPAU TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF VBDPAU.
TYPES : TT_FINAL TYPE TABLE OF TY_FINAL.
TYPES : TT_KONV TYPE TABLE OF TY_KONV.
TYPES : TT_TLINE TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE.
TYPES : TT_ADR6 TYPE TABLE OF TY_ADR6.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: DATA: WA_VBAP LIKE LINE OF IT_VBDPA,
DATA : IT_VBFA TYPE TABLE OF STR_VBFA,
DATA : IT_MATNR TYPE TABLE OF STR_MATNR,
* LV_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
it_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
READ TABLE IT_NTP INTO DATA(WA_NTP) WITH KEY KPOSN = LV_POS .
SELECT POSNR MATNR FROM VBAP INTO TABLE IT_MATNR WHERE
SELECT VBELN, POSNR, LFGSA, GBSTA FROM VBAP
READ TABLE IT_VBUP INTO WA_VBUP WITH KEY POSNR = WA_VBAP-POSNR.
SELECT VBELV POSNV RFMNG FROM VBFA INTO TABLE IT_VBFA
WHERE VBELV = IS_VBDKA-VBELN AND VBTYP_N = 'M'."IS_VBDKA-VBELN and vbtyp_n = 'M'.
IF SY-SUBRC = 0 AND IT_VBFA IS NOT INITIAL.
LOOP AT IT_VBFA INTO WA_VBFA WHERE VBELV = IS_VBDKA-VBELN
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBPA INTO WA_VBPA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_BILTO
SMTP_ADDR FROM ADR6 INTO TABLE IT_ADR6
CONCATENATE GV_EMAIL WA_ADR6-SMTP_ADDR ',' INTO GV_EMAIL SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM MARA INTO WA_MARA
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0001' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
CONCATENATE 'Tag No-' lv_lines1 INTO GV_TAG SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* CONCATENATE 'Tag No-' WA_LINES1-TDLINE INTO GV_TAG SEPARATED BY SPACE."CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* CONCATENATE GV_TAG WA_LINES1-TDLINE INTO GV_TAG SEPARATED BY SPACE."CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* CONCATENATE 'Tag No:-' GV_TAG INTO GV_TAG SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE CUSTDELDATE , DELDATE FROM VBAP INTO @DATA(WA_DAT)
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '/' IN WA_FINAL-LFDAT WITH '.'.
* IF LFGSA <> C and GBSTA <> C.
* KINAK FROM KONV INTO TABLE IT_KONV
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAK INTO WA_VBAK
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBKD INTO WA_VBKD
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T001W INTO WA_T001W
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE * FROM TVZBT INTO WA_TVZBT
SELECT SINGLE * FROM TINCT INTO WA_TINCT
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE WA_LINES-TDLINE GV_SHIP INTO GV_SHIP SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U001' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_ECCN WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_ECCN SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U002' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_INFO WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_INFO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U006' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_REMARK WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_REMARK SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U005' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBPA INTO WA_VBPA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_SHIPTO
SMTP_ADDR FROM ADR6 INTO TABLE IT_ADR6
CONCATENATE GV_EMAILH WA_ADR6-SMTP_ADDR ',' INTO GV_EMAILH SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBPA INTO WA_VBPA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '</>' IN TEXTERMS WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<C1>' IN TEXTERMS WITH ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ST' name = 'ZTERMS' object = 'TEXT' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '</>' IN TEXTERMS2 WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<C1>' IN TEXTERMS2 WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<c1>' IN TEXTERMS2 WITH ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ST' name = 'ZTERMS_GLOBAL' object = 'TEXT' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '</>' IN TEXTERMS3 WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<C1>' IN TEXTERMS3 WITH ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ST' name = 'ZTERMS_1' object = 'TEXT' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '</>' IN TEXTERMS4 WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<C1>' IN TEXTERMS4 WITH ' '.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<c1>' IN TEXTERMS4 WITH ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ST' name = 'ZTERMS_GLOBAL_1' object = 'TEXT' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
